overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a samurai character walking along a dramatic coastal landscape during golden hour sunset. The character traverses rocky beaches, grassy cliffs, and sandy shores with ocean waves and distant mountains visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal shoreline with steep cliffs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky shoreline with weapons sheathed on back

entered.detail: tall white-gray rock cliff face rising steeply from the beach
gravel and stone covered ground along the shoreline
turquoise ocean waves crashing against the shore
sea stacks and rock outcroppings visible in the ocean distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rocky coastal path with a steep cliff wall to the left and the ocean to the right. The lighting is diffused and overcast, with gray skies above. The terrain is covered in gravel and scattered stones, with sparse coastal vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: grass cliff path overlooking ocean at sunset

events.description: sun emerges from behind clouds creating dramatic golden hour lighting
ground surface transitions from rocky beach to grassy cliff terrain

agents.ego_description: walking along grassy cliff edge toward the setting sun with weapons visible on back

entered.detail: grassy terrain with low shrubs covering the cliffside path
prominent tall rock formation rising from the ocean
bright golden sun low on the horizon creating lens flare

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a grassy cliff path as the sun breaks through, bathing the landscape in warm golden light. The character walks toward the setting sun with a large sea stack rock formation visible in the ocean. The cliff wall recedes to the left as the terrain becomes covered in grass and low coastal vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with distant mountain view

events.description: terrain transitions from grass to sandy beach surface
snow-capped mountain becomes clearly visible in the distant background

agents.ego_description: walking along sandy beach with ocean waves to the right, heading toward distant mountains

entered.detail: smooth sand covering the shoreline with scattered driftwood
distant mountain peak with visible snow cap rising above the coastline

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the coast as the ground becomes sandy beach. The sun moves to the right side creating side-lighting, and a snow-capped mountain becomes visible in the distant background. The large sea stack recedes behind as the character walks past it, with ocean waves continuing to crash along the shore.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal path that transforms from a gloomy, overcast cliffside into a radiant, sun-drenched beach. It begins with the character traversing a rocky gravel path beneath gray skies, flanked by a steep cliff wall and the ocean. As the sun breaks through the clouds, the lighting shifts to warm golden tones and the terrain transitions into a grassy cliff path leading toward a prominent sea stack rock formation. The scene then opens further as the grass gives way to a sandy beach, with the sun moving to the side to illuminate the crashing waves. Finally, the camera tracks the character past the receding sea stack to reveal a snow-capped mountain emerging in the distant background.
